analysis.reasoning: Core message: The author met former Afghan President Hamid Karzai and states that China will continue to play a constructive role in the next stages of the Afghan peace process. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—tweet portrays China as constructive and supportive of peace in another country, aligning with cooperation and contribution to international security. CH3 (epic history): Not relevant. CH4 (appropriate political system and values domestically): Not addressed; focus is international role. CH5 (CCP governance success): No claim about domestic achievements or leadership prowess. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
